code: import _asyncToGenerator from"@babel/runtime/helpers/asyncToGenerator";import Platform from"react-native-web/dist/exports/Platform";import*as SecureStore from'expo-secure-store';export function setItemAsync(_x,_x2){return _setItemAsync.apply(this,arguments);}function _setItemAsync(){_setItemAsync=_asyncToGenerator(function*(key,value){if("web"==='web'){try{localStorage.setItem(key,value);}catch(e){console.warn('Storage not available on web',e);}}else{yield SecureStore.setItemAsync(key,value);}});return _setItemAsync.apply(this,arguments);}export function getItemAsync(_x3){return _getItemAsync.apply(this,arguments);}function _getItemAsync(){_getItemAsync=_asyncToGenerator(function*(key){if("web"==='web'){try{return localStorage.getItem(key);}catch(e){console.warn('Storage not available on web',e);return null;}}else{return yield SecureStore.getItemAsync(key);}});return _getItemAsync.apply(this,arguments);}export function deleteItemAsync(_x4){return _deleteItemAsync.apply(this,arguments);}function _deleteItemAsync(){_deleteItemAsync=_asyncToGenerator(function*(key){if("web"==='web'){try{localStorage.removeItem(key);}catch(e){console.warn('Storage not available on web',e);}}else{yield SecureStore.deleteItemAsync(key);}});return _deleteItemAsync.apply(this,arguments);}
